no: BP in BG says to install early. SD places it after UI? The vendor stocks are different in this version compared to the minigame, and the cash & EXP rewards are lesser. Also install it before Made in Heaven Encounters & Quests and SubtleDoctor’s Hotfixes.
sum: Brings Baldur's Gate 2 Bonus Pack content into BG1. Adds the bonus merchant and items from the original BG2 bonus CD.

co.n: add access to the Black Pits in BGEE/EET
co.tp2n: add access to the Black Pits in BGEE/EET
co.no: Access the Black Pits arena from within the BG1/EET campaign.
